text.title: Market Research TAM SAM SOM Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid Market Research TAM SAM SOM artefact. The validator script enforces required keys, types, and the forbidden-pattern list before the orchestrator accepts the output.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing every required field; no owner, no template_version, no evidence array — rejected by `validate-market-research-tam-sam-som.py` with exit 1.

forbidden.pattern: Field declared as list/object in the schema is emitted as prose paragraph.
`template_version` empty or set to a string that does not match the methodology frontmatter.
`evidence` array empty for any non-trivial field declared in the schema.
Agent self-approves the artefact (`status=approved`) without a reviewer field naming a human distinct from the producing agent.

text.reference: Validator script — exit 0 on pass, 1 on fail with violation list.
